title: React Native Developer (d/f/m)
description:
At hello again, we empower companies to build lasting customer relationships through a sophisticated digital loyalty solution. We aren't just building "an app"; we manage a massive fleet of 1000+ white-label applications across Europe. As we transition into the next era of mobile development, we are looking for a Mobile Engineer who wants to move beyond feature tickets and take ownership of a high-scale engine.
In this role, you don’t just ship code; you architect a platform. You will join an agile team where the "Architectural Pause" is valued - evaluating trade-offs to ensure our multi-tenant system remains performant and maintainable at scale.

Your Tasks

- Platform Evolution: Develop and maintain highly decoupled, brand-agnostic components that form the core of our 1,000+ apps.
- Embracing the New Architecture: Lead the integration of modern React Native patterns (JSI, Fabric, TurboModules) to eliminate bridge bottlenecks.
- Agentic Engineering: Leverage cutting-edge AI tools like Claude Code to accelerate development cycles and implement agentic workflows for automated problem-solving.
- AI-Native Features: Build and integrate AI-driven functionalities directly into our White Label App Builder.
- Automation & DX: Maintain and optimize our automated app-building pipeline, ensuring seamless delivery for hundreds of heterogeneous brands.

Your Qualifications

- Proven React Native Expertise: Deep knowledge of TypeScript/JavaScript and the React Native ecosystem (minimum of 4 years professional experience).
- Architecture Mindset: Experience with state management (e.g., Redux) and a focus on modular, scalable codebases.
- AI-First Approach: Enthusiasm for AI-assisted development and the ability to integrate Agentic Engineering principles into your daily workflow.
- Native Fluency (Plus): Ability to dive into Swift, Objective-C, Kotlin, or Java to solve complex native challenges.
- Quality & Automation: Experience with E2E testing frameworks (e.g., Maestro) and CI/CD pipelines.
- Language: Professional English skills; German is a welcome plus.
- Location: You are ready to join our team on-site in Leonding or Vienna (with flexible home-office options).

That’s waiting for you:

- Growth & Mentorship: Advance your career in a culture of continuous learning and proactive support.
- State-of-the-Art Tech: Work with a modern stack and choose the hardware that maximizes your productivity.
- Dynamic Environment: Thrive in an inspiring atmosphere within a rapidly scaling, successful company.
- Team Spirit: Join a cohesive unit with numerous team events designed to foster connection throughout the year.
- Prime Location: Benefit from a modern office space with excellent public transport connectivity .
- Flexibility: Maintain a healthy work-life balance through flexi-time and remote work options.
- Global Impact: Shape the future of our platform alongside international talent in a high-growth setting.
- Collaborative Culture: Contribute to a value-driven environment where knowledge sharing and team synergy are paramount.

Depending on your qualification and background, you will receive a performance-oriented salary that suits your profile and abilities. For this position, we offer a gross annual salary from €50.000 to €70.000. Depending on qualifications and experience, there is the possibility of overpayment.

More insights about us:

- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/helloagain.official/
